saṃ-√kliś P. -kliśnāti (only inf. -kleṣṭum and ind.p. -kliśya), to press together,  ŚBr. ;
to torment, pain, afflict,  R.  :
Pass. -kliśyate, to get soiled,  Divyāv.  (cf. next).
